title: ChestShopRefund
description: Lets players refund accidental ChestShop transactions
body:
# ChestShopRefund With this ChestShop addon, players can refund accidental ChestShop transactions. ![A visual of how the plugin looks to players ingame](https://i.imgur.com/jBMuD2Z.jpeg) ## Dependencies - Requires both [ChestShop](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chestshop) and [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/). - Requires Paper or any fork of it. - Requires 1.16.5 or higher. If you want ChestShopRefund to remove refunded transactions from ChestShopNotifier, just make sure you're using CSN version 1.3.4-SNAPSHOT which you can download from [Minebench](https://ci.minebench.de/job/ChestShopNotifier/). ## Commands **/csrefund refund**
Permission: chestshoprefund.command.refund (granted by default)
Lets you refund transactions.
Kinda a fake command. When the player clicks the undo message, they end up running this behind the scenes, although they probably wont be aware that they ran a command at all. **/csrefund reload**
Permission: chestshoprefund.command.reload
Reloads the plugin. **/csrefund debug**
Permission: chestshoprefund.command.debug
Toggles debug mode. ## Usage Stats See more stats here.
